name: Calum Dear

publications_presentations.label: Publications
publications_presentations.text: First-author papers in APL Materials and Journal of Physics D (see ORCID, Scholar).

publications_presentations.label: Conferences
publications_presentations.text: Presented at 11 academic conferences to audiences of 100+ (notably NAMBE 2024, Boston, US and ICMBE 2024, Matsue, Japan).

leadership: I have consistently sought positions of responsibility. I served as a student representative throughout my BSc, MSc, and Ph.D., and played a central role in the undergraduate mentoring programme, eventually coordinating the mentoring provision across the entire college. I also spent a year managing a high-volume cocktail bar, leading staff and overseeing day-to-day operations.
